title: Use of English – 2024 Admisión Titular A

questions.prompt: Please, don’t make me ... it again.
answers: say

questions.prompt: By this time next year, I ... at Harvard University.
answers: will be studying

questions.prompt: Some thieves broke ... my house last night.
The more you work out, the ... you feel.
The Prime Minister is said to be preparing a statement.
answers: People say that the Prime Minister is preparing a statement
They say that the Prime Minister is preparing a statement

questions.prompt: Somebody must have dropped my mobile phone in the pool.
answers: My mobile phone must have been dropped in the pool

questions.prompt: I’d rather go to the cinema tonight.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: Where would you rather go tonight
Where would I rather go tonight
Where would you rather go to tonight
Where would I rather go to tonight

questions.prompt: I will never forget my daughter’s graduation day. She gave a moving speech that day.
answers: I will never forget my daughter’s graduation day, when she gave a moving speech
I'll never forget my daughter’s graduation day, when she gave a moving speech
I will never forget my daughter’s graduation day, in which she gave a moving speech
I'll never forget my daughter’s graduation day, in which she gave a moving speech

questions.prompt: I had never read such a long book.
answers: It was the longest book I had ever read
It was the longest book I'd ever read
It was the longest book I would ever read
It was the longest book that I had ever read
It was the longest book that I'd ever read
It was the longest book that I would ever read

questions.prompt: If you had called me earlier, ...

manualCorrection.structure: subject + would / could / might + have + past participle // mixed conditional

questions.prompt: I am looking forward to go to Australia, which is my favorite country of the whole world.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: I am looking forward to going to Australia, which is my favorite country in the whole world
I'm looking forward to going to Australia, which is my favorite country in the whole world

questions.prompt: Sarah said she had lost her keys the night before.
answers: Sarah said, I lost my keys last night
Sarah said, I lost my keys yesterday night

questions.prompt: 'We won’t be able to attend your party today,' they told us.
answers: They told us that they wouldn’t be able to attend our party on that day
They told us that they would not be able to attend our party on that day
They told us that they wouldn’t be able to attend our party that day
They told us that they would not be able to attend our party that day
They said to us that they wouldn’t be able to attend our party on that day
They said to us that they would not be able to attend our party on that day
They said to us that they wouldn’t be able to attend our party that day
They said to us that they would not be able to attend our party that day

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: ? / inviting / to / evening / about / tomorrow / her / dinner / how
answers: How about inviting her to dinner tomorrow evening
